title: Staleness badges + covers/backlinks navigation
description:
Wire freshness + navigation into the UI:
- Staleness badge per page (tree + page header) from the kb.py status cache (repo-wiki/.ingest/status.json via load_status_cache); trigger a background reconcile on serve start so the cache is warm. Badge states: fresh / stale / unverified.
- Show each page's covers globs.
- Backlinks: list other pages that reference this page (grep the page's filename/slug across repo-wiki/); render as links.

Touches server + app.js (shared) -> depends on T3.

Test:
- a page whose covers changed in git shows a 'stale' badge (reuse compute_status/cache)
- a page linked from another shows that page under Backlinks
acceptance_criteria: Each page shows a staleness badge from the status cache and its covers; backlinks list referencing pages
closed_reason: Completed: /api/status (reuses compute_status; bg reconcile on serve start) → fresh/stale/unverified pills in sidebar+header; covers chips; /api/backlinks (sandboxed) + backlinks section.
